query:
SELECT c.externalId, c.name, c.customerType,
  COUNT(bi.id) as totalBillingItems,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bi.description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied NBN voice and internet bundle%'
            OR bi.description LIKE '%Site Bundle%'
            OR bi.description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied mobile broadband%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bundleItems
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Zambrero Woodvale%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Harajuku%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Gorman%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Rumi%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Ma Pa Me%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Cheesecake Shop%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Poppy%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Spaghetti House%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%KHM Group%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Lune Co%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%LFF Australia%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Michael McNamara%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Alan Powell%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Cirque Apartments%'
GROUP BY c.externalId, c.name, c.customerType
ORDER BY c.name
